§ 1910.95 Occupational noise exposure.
percent noise exposure TWA ---------------------------------- 10 73.4 15 76.3 20 78.4 25 80.0 30 81.3 35 82.4 40 83.4 45 84.2 50 85.0 55 85.7 60 86.3 65 86.9 70 87.4 75 87.9 80 88.4 81 88.5 82 88.6 83 88.7 84 88.7 85 88.8 86 88.9 87 89.0 88 89.1 89 89.2 90 89.2 91 89.3 92 89.4 93 89.5 94 89.6 95 89.6 96 89.7 97 89.8 98 89.9 99 89.9 100 90.0 101 90.1 102 90.1 103 90.2 104 90.3 105 90.4 106 90.4 107 90.5 108 90.6 109 90.6 110 90.7 111 90.8 112 90.8 113 90.9 114 90.9 115 91.1 116 91.1 117 91.1 118 91.2 119 91.3 120 91.3 125 91.6 130 91.9 135 92.2 140 92.4 145 92.7 150 92.9 155 93.2 160 93.4 165 93.6 170 93.8 175 94.0 180 94.2 185 94.4 190 94.6 195 94.8 200 95.0 210 95.4 220 95.7 230 96.0 240 96.3 250 96.6 260 96.9 270 97.2 280 97.4 290 97.7 300 97.9 310 98.2 320 98.4 330 98.6 340 98.8 350 99.0 360 99.2 370 99.4 380 99.6 390 99.8 400 100.0 410 100.2 420 100.4 430 100.5 440 100.7 450 100.8 460 101.0 470 101.2 480 101.3 490 101.5 500 101.6 510 101.8 520 101.9 530 102.0 540 102.2 550 102.3 560 102.4 570 102.6 580 102.7 590 102.8 600 102.9 610 103.0 620 103.2 630 103.3 640 103.4 650 103.5 660
